## Why

What human or agent problem does this change improve?

## Surface

- [ ] Router / metadata (`SKILL.md`, `.well-known/`)
- [ ] References / docs
- [ ] Templates / assets
- [ ] Scripts / verification
- [ ] Evals
- [ ] CI / release hygiene

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] `npm run verify:publish`
- [ ] Artifact-specific `npm run verify:lite -- <file.html>` when HTML changed
- [ ] Preview or export checked when the change affects visual output

## Notes

Known gaps, risks, or follow-up work:
